TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani = Mntucing hngkawas 1980 idas 6 jiyax 3 ka Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Qatar ta sayang o kiya ka Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 6 jiyax 25 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = tamim bin ħamad al tħani = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka tamim bin ħamad al tħani ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan qataɾ ta sajaŋ o kija ka tamim bin ħamad al tħani, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani = Mntucing hngkawas 1980 idas 6 jiyax 3 ka Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Qatar ta sayang o kiya ka Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 6 jiyax 25 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = tamim bin ħamad al tħani = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka tamim bin ħamad al tħani ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan qataɾ ta sajaŋ o kija ka tamim bin ħamad al tħani, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
